metadata.description: Curated activity suggestions for Soft Plans, organized by time available and tagged by energy level, emotional state, and desired focus

5 minutes.text: Name three things you can hear
Dance until you're out of breath
Listen to a song you love
Name five smells in the room
Have a conversation with your inner child
Name five things you can see
Put things into a pile to organize later
Come up with a new word
Rest your hand on your chest and feel your breath
Watch light change on a wall or object
Balance something on your finger as long as you can
Stand where you are and slowly turn in a full circle
Draw the shape of your current mood
Think of a time you felt supported
Write down one thing you learned today

30 minutes.text: Arrange found objects into a small display
Write down a dream you remember
Read a chapter or short story
Drop a note in someone's mailbox
Explore a new genre of music
Write a letter to an ancestor and burn it
Write out your month on a physical calendar
Rearrange a corner of a room
Draw a map of your neighborhood
Make a list of things that make you happy
Write down a plan for your day
Make a mix tape for your current mood
Sew two pieces of fabric together
Tell someone a memory you have of them

1 hour.text: Make signs for things around your home
Put loose items in jars or containers
Listen to recordings of space sounds
Make a list of your anxieties
Write a letter to your future self
Put some unused items on the curb
Go chat with a shopkeeper you like
Find a natural body of water
Start a group call with friends
Draft a theory of the universe
Create a story on printer paper
Start and finish a project in one sitting
Dance until you're out of breath

2 hours.text: Host friends for tea or coffee
Prepare food to share with a neighbor
Visit a cemetery and read headstones
Go for a long bike ride
Write a short story or essay
Go somewhere with a beautiful view
Take public transit somewhere and walk back
Collect objects on a nature walk
Create a series of small paintings
Make a flyer for an event in your area
Make a simple piece of furniture
Build an altar or fairy house
Bring a book to read in a social environment
Plan or tend to a garden
Write or draw in a cafe

Half day.text: Visit a botanical garden or arboretum
Map all the free water sources in your area
Forage for edible plants you can safely identify
Write down the most important events of your life
Watch the landscape change from a high point
Start a free shelf or book swap in a public space
Map all the trees in a certain area
Trade skills or services with someone
Follow a river or stream as far as you can
Knock a big item off your to-do list
Ask neighbors if they need anything
Write postcards to people in your life
Help a friend with a project
Learn about the ecology of your area
Start and finish a project in one sitting
Host an arts or crafts event
Ask someone to teach you something

Full day.text: Take a train somewhere new
Spend the day walking with no planned route
Hike a challenging trail
Invent a new language to speak for the day
Spend the day barefoot in as many terrains as possible
Walk every trail in a single park
Spend the day in silent observation
Take a dip at multiple natural swimming areas
Visit every bridge in your area
Spend the day without buying anything
Host an open studio
Spend the day only using what you already have
Build a fire pit in your yard
Trade places with a friend for the day
Spend the day in places you've never been before
Have a garage sale or item swap
Spend the day giving things away
Trace a body of water from source to mouth
Visit only free-entry spaces all day
Spend the day documenting free or open resources in your area
Leave encouraging art or notes in public spaces
Travel only by foot, bike, or free transit
Find and document all the naturally occurring spirals you see
Record one sound per hour
Track how light changes in a single space over the course of the day
Go camping
Watch the sunrise and sunset in two different locations
See if a friend wants to spend the day together
Map your day in drawings instead of words
Document your day in audio recordings
Explore a nearby island or peninsula
Build something that helps people
Restore a piece of furniture
Rearrange your home
Create a temporary public art display
Take a workshop
Bike from town to town
Build a low-tech application
Create an art installation
Lead a community project
Create a garden
Take a ferry somewhere
Film a day-in-the-life documentary
Volunteer somewhere
Do a museum crawl
Host a talent show
Make a zine
Ditch your devices for the day
Plant trees
Clean or restore a public space
